title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
# Announcements Filter Past Announcements
To
Filter
Announcements | Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Acquisition of Land 0.045 acres at Mouja Singerbil Sheet 3(1)/P under Mohanpur Sub Division | Acquisition of Land 0.045 acres at Mouja Singerbil Sheet 3(1)/P under Mohanpur Sub Division for conversion of existing road from Lichubagan to Airport | 05/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
| ORDER UNDER SECTION 144 Cr.P.C Dated 04/08/2020 | ORDER UNDER SECTION 144 Cr.P.C Dated 04/08/2020 the unlock measures-1 for containment of COVID-19 pandemic in West Tripura District has been further continued w.e.f 04/08/2020 to 31/08/2020 | 04/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
| Memo for hired Technical Assistants (TA) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 | Memo for hired Technical Assistants (TA) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 and updating of NPR are hereby discontinued w.e.f the afternoon of 31st August 2020 for the time being. | 29/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
| Memo for hired Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 | Memo for hired Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) who were engaged on contract basis to strengthen the Census 2021 and updating of NPR are hereby discontinued w.e.f the afternoon of 31st August 2020 for the time being.
